response.justification: Szabo is an accomplished software engineer with 20+ years of broad experience, but this role requires a specialized C++ developer with industrial automation expertise. His last significant C++ work was 2014–2015; his recent 5+ year trajectory is exclusively web-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, React). The role demands hands-on C++ systems programming, secure development practices (SDL/IEC 62443), MQTT/message brokers, and industrial domain knowledge—none of which appear in his resume. The gap between his current skillset and the role's specialized requirements is too large for a mid-senior hire.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience with demonstrated ability to master diverse tech stacks and ship production systems
Strong software craftsmanship foundation including TDD, testing, mentoring, and open-source contributions (GISCollective platform)
Hands-on full-stack capabilities and experience with event-driven, distributed systems architecture
concerns: C++ expertise is 10+ years outdated (2014–2015); last 5 years exclusively web development, not systems programming or concurrent applications
Zero background in industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA); no MQTT or industrial cybersecurity experience
No demonstrated expertise in multi-threading, secure development lifecycle, IEC 62443 standards, or message-broker-based large-scale system design

key_factors.factor: General software engineering capability and learning ability
